title: Manual Mortar and Pestle Set Premium PP Pestle & Mortar Set Spice Grinder Garlic Herb Spice Mixing Grinder Mortar and Pestle Grinder Pill Grinder Kitchen Bowl Smashing Tools(Wood Color)
description:
About this item
【Practical Kitchen Tool】Mortar and pestle sethas been used for THOUSANDS of years as THE way to crush, grind and powder herbs and dry spices.the age-old, durable, traditional manual grinding method ensures that all cooking ingredients bring out their full flavor and aroma profiles.
【Premium Material】Multi‑functional garlic grinder is made of high quality solid thick PP plastic to ensure durability.Surface with clear texture, smooth, burr‑free, no painting, safe and healthy.
【Kitchen Decor】 Exquisite workmanship, Kitchen Grinder easy to clean, and long service life. Food grinder is also a functional art piece that tells your guests, dinner will be great!
【Ergonomic Design】Ergonomic pestle is comfortable to hold, smooth surface won't hurt your hands after long time use, easy to use and labor‑saving,Mortar Grinder for Spices convenient to grind.
【Multi‑function】Food grinder is suitable for grinding garlic, ginger, walnut kernel, chili, sesame, medicinal materials, etc. It is also widely used in pharmacies and apothecaries, helping you powder pills for optimal ingestion.
reviews_5s: Mine just came in the mail and I am in love. I thought it was going to be wooden but it is actually a thick plastic, which for me is better than wood because when I use it to make paints the wood would absorb the liquid. Overall amazing product, I would recommend buying!
